_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work with stakeholders to resolve computer security incidents and vulnerability compliance.
reference_document_element_description: Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extraction, transformation, analysis, and delivery of findings with documented methodology.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-003 (SP, cosine: 0.489), RC-A-005 (RC, cosine: 0.478).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.300). Shared vocabulary: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only terms [compliance, computer, incidents, resolve, security, vulnerability] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, analytical, business, data, delivery, documented] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.888, R=0.873). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Work with stakeholders to resolve computer security incidents and vulnerability" and "Execute analytical requests from business stakeholders, including data extractio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.496 > STS 0.300 (gap +0.196). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [stakeholders] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [stakeholders]. DCWF-only: [compliance, computer, incidents, resolve, security, vulnerability]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, analytical, business, data, delivery, documented].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.196 with low STS 0.300. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
